inputs.label: Cost Price
inputs.businessContext: The unit cost of the product or service.

businessContext_i18n.en: The unit cost of the product or service.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Stückpreis des Produkts oder der Dienstleistung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le coût unitaire du produit ou service.
businessContext_i18n.es: El coste unitario del producto o servicio.

inputs.label: Markup Percentage
inputs.businessContext: The percentage markup applied to the cost price.

businessContext_i18n.en: The percentage markup applied to the cost price.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Maliyet fiyatına uygulanan yüzde kar marjı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der prozentuale Aufschlag auf den Einstandspreis.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le pourcentage de marge appliqué au prix de revient.
businessContext_i18n.es: El porcentaje de margen aplicado al precio de coste.

inputs.label: Quantity
inputs.businessContext: Number of units to calculate totals for.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of units to calculate totals for.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Einheiten zur Berechnung der Gesamtsummen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'unités pour calculer les totaux.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de unidades para calcular totales.

inputs.label: Additional Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Extra cost per unit such as shipping, packaging, or handling.

businessContext_i18n.en: Extra cost per unit such as shipping, packaging, or handling.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nakliye, paketleme veya elleçleme gibi birim başına ek maliyet.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzliche Kosten pro Einheit wie Versand, Verpackung oder Bearbeitung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût supplémentaire par unité tel que l'expédition, l'emballage ou la manutention.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste extra por unidad como envío, embalaje o manipulación.

formulas.totalProfit: (costPrice + costPrice * markupPercent / 100 + additionalCostPerUnit) * quantity - (costPrice + additionalCostPerUnit) * quantity
formulas.profitMargin: (((costPrice + costPrice * markupPercent / 100 + additionalCostPerUnit) * quantity - (costPrice + additionalCostPerUnit) * quantity) / ((costPrice + costPrice * markupPercent / 100 + additionalCostPerUnit) * quantity)) * 100

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
